name: @gamepark/game-template
description: The rules of Game Template adapted for Game Park
author: Romain Fromi <romain@game-park.com> (https://game-park.com/)

scripts.publish: yarn version ${0:-patch} && yarn npm publish && git commit -am v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push --follow-tags
